metadata.description: Platform readiness matrix for 44 games with HONEST completion metrics, quality gates, and architectural scores
metadata.honestMetricsImplemented: 2026-03-31 - All completion percentages verified against source code (code audit completed)
metadata.notes: HONEST baseline: portfolio average 63% (not fabricated 84%). 2 reference games (90%+), 5 mature (76-89%), 14 developing (60-79%), 1 basic (45%), 4 empty stubs (25-35%), 17 not-started (0%)
